PN CN215672216-U
TI High-hardness rock-soil rapid excavation mechanism for underground tunnelling work, has pipeline provided with booster pump outlet direction towards high pressure carbon dioxide tank that is provided with temperature and pressure sensors.
AU DING Z
   MA X
   CHEN Y
   HAN M
   SONG G
AE CHINA COAL TIANJIN UNDERGROUND ENG INTEL (CHCO-Non-standard)
GA 202223094H
AB    NOVELTY - The utility model claims a high-hardness soil fast development mechanism, comprising a carbon dioxide gas source, carbon dioxide gas source is connected with a high pressure carbon dioxide tank through the first pipeline, the high pressure carbon dioxide tank is connected with a second pipeline; the working surface is provided with a cover body, the second pipeline extends into the cover body and is connected with a nozzle for spraying supercritical carbon dioxide, the spraying direction of the nozzle faces to the working surface; the first pipeline is provided with a first booster pump outlet direction towards the high pressure carbon dioxide tank, the high pressure carbon dioxide tank is provided with a first temperature sensor and a first pressure sensor. The utility model can effectively reduce the hardness of the working surface rock, without changing the engineering construction position (without changing the direction of the underground passage) because of high soil hardness, it does not need to modify the engineering design, the underground engineering design and construction has better stability, avoids various loss caused by modifying design, improves the economic benefit .

PN CN214155481-U
TI Temperature and humidity intelligent adjusting device for planting agilawood tree, has control box respectively provided with electromagnetic valve, water pump and heating rod that is connected with circuit to form control circuit.
AU ZHAN Y
   TIAN X
   ZHANG Q
AE HAINAN LIMUSHAN AGARWOOD TEA CULTURE CO LTD (HAIN-Non-standard)
GA 2021D49800
AB    NOVELTY - A temperature and humidity intelligent adjusting device for planting agilawood tree, composed of an air circulating circuit, a carbon dioxide concentration lifting circuit, a humidity adjusting circuit, a temperature adjusting circuit, an intelligent control circuit; a humidity sensor; a temperature sensor; the carbon dioxide concentration sensor respectively used for measuring the humidity of the surrounding environment of the agilawood tree; temperature and carbon dioxide concentration; when the concentration of carbon dioxide is insufficient, the electromagnetic valve is opened; the carbon dioxide gas enters the vent pipe to increase the carbon dioxide concentration around the agilawood tree; when the humidity is insufficient, the water pump is opened; the humidifier is started; increasing the humidity of the surrounding of the agilawood tree; when the temperature is low, the heating rod is opened; heating to enter the ventilation pipe air, improving the air temperature. The utility model through the carbon dioxide bottle, humidifying device and heating device to finish the improvement of aquilaria sinensis tree micro-environment, which can effectively adjust the temperature of the aquilaria sinensis tree, humidity and carbon dioxide concentration, improving the environment of aquilaria sinensis leaves growth, improving the quality and yield of agilawood tea.

AU VIALA A
   SCUDELLER M
   BONHOMME L
   HATTOU S
AE ARKOLIA ENERGIES (ARKO-Non-standard)
   ARKOLIA ENERGIES SAS (ARKO-Non-standard)
   ARKOLIA ENERGIES (ARKO-Non-standard)
GA 202159070P
AB    NOVELTY - An installation (10) consists of a source of                electrical energy (11), a water electrolyzer (14)                supplied with electrical energy by the electrical                energy source, for producing hydrogen in the form                of gas, a device (16) for capturing atmospheric                carbon dioxide for producing carbon dioxide and                water, a methanation reactor (15) provided with a                hydrogen inlet for the electrolyzer and a water and                carbon dioxide inlet for the atmospheric carbon                dioxide capture device, a solar collectors (19) and                an unit for transferring heat from the solar                collectors to the carbon dioxide capture                device.
   USE - Installation used for forming methane.
   ADVANTAGE - The installation has reduced water requirement                by supplying required water of the methanation                reactor by the atmospheric carbon dioxide capture                device, and contributes to save heat and eliminates                the need to consume electrical energy produced by                the photovoltaic panels to supply heat to the                carbon dioxide capture device.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a block diagram of the heat                transfer between different components of the                installation.
   Installation (10)
   Source of electrical energy (11)
   Water electrolyzer (14)
   Methanation reactor (15)
   Device (16)
   Compressor (17)
   Gas distribution or transportation network                (18)
   Solar collector (19)
   Unit (20)
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - CHEMICAL ENGINEERING - Preferred Components: The installation                  consists of a unit for collecting runoff from the                  solar collectors and the source of electrical                  energy comprising photovoltaic panels, a unit                  (20) for dehydration of the methane leaving the                  methanation reactor, comprising a water inlet                  from the dehydration unit, which is adapted to                  supply water to-be-electrolyzed at the inlet of                  the electrolyzer, a heat transfer unit adapted to                  transfer heat from the electrolyzer to the device                  for capturing carbon dioxide, and a compressor                  (17) for compressing the methane produced by the                  methanation reactor and injecting into a network                  (18) for transport or gas distribution. The                  electrolyzer comprises an inlet for runoff                  collected on the solar collectors and is                  configured for electrolyzing water from the                  methanation reactor and for electrolyzing water                  leaving the device for capturing atmospheric                  carbon dioxide. The source of electrical energy                  comprises a photovoltaic panels provided with a                  cooling system. The methanation reactor is a                  bio-methanation reactor, catalytic methanation                  reactor, or thermochemical bio-methanation                  reactor.

PN CN212789373-U
TI Excessive ventilation correcting device for trachea cannula or cutting patient, has carbon dioxide detachably covered on upper end of air inlet pipe, where cover body of carbon dioxide is provided with multiple vent holes.
AU QU Z
AE UNIV HENAN SCI & TECHNOLOGY FIRST AFFILI (UYTG-C)
GA 202135353B
AB    NOVELTY - The utility model claims an excessive ventilation correcting device for trachea cannula or cutting patient, comprising an artificial nose and a correcting component, the artificial nose comprises a shell and a filter element set in the shell; the lower end of the shell is provided with a connecting pipe for connecting the air pipe; the upper end of the shell is provided with an air inlet; the correcting component comprises an air inlet pipe and a carbon dioxide the lower end of the air inlet pipe is connected with the air inlet of the shell, carbon dioxide can detachably covered on the upper end of the air inlet pipe; the cover body of the carbon dioxide provided with multiple vent holes; and the density and the aperture of the vent hole are gradually reduced from top to bottom. The utility model corrects the excessive ventilation through the detachable carbon dioxide when the patient is over-ventilated, the carbon dioxide is on the air inlet pipe, increasing the carbon dioxide content in the suction air, correcting the effect of over-ventilation.

PN JP2021011685-A
TI Underground storage method for storing carbon dioxide in a sandy system ground, involves pouring the carbon dioxide quantity corresponded to the interval in the sandy system ground by a casing pipe that is penetrated on sandy system ground.
AU NOZU M
   YAMASHITA Y
AE FUDO TETRA CORP (FUDO-Non-standard)
GA 2021128715
AB    NOVELTY - The underground storage method involves pouring the carbon dioxide (3) quantity corresponded to the interval in the sandy system ground (1) by a casing pipe (16) that is penetrated on the sandy system ground. The compressed air is poured into the ground surface vicinity of the sandy system ground by the casing pipe. The casing pipe is penetrated in the hard stratum in the sandy system ground, and the carbonated water is used as excavation water. The ground surface is poured after the construction in the sandy system ground, which is covered with an airtight sheet (4) or material with low water permeability. The exhausted carbon dioxide is recovered and reused in the atmosphere from the casing pipe.
   USE - Underground storage method for storing carbon dioxide in a sandy system ground.
   ADVANTAGE - The underground storage method suppresses the rise of the carbon dioxide levels in the atmosphere, smoothly penetrates the casing pipe in the sandy system ground, and easily achieves the underground storage of the carbon dioxide.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a schematic representation of the underground storage method.
   Sandy system ground (1)
   Carbon dioxide (3)
   Airtight sheet (4)
   Casing pipe (16)
   Container hopper (17)

PT P
PN CN112250097-A
TI Regulating calcium-based carbon dioxide adsorbent microstructure comprises e.g. dissolving calcium nitrate tetrahydrate and citric acid monohydrate in deionized water, treating, aging, drying, igniting, casting and calcining.
AU LUO C
   LUO T
   ZHANG L
   LI X
   WU F
AE UNIV HUAZHONG SCI & TECHNOLOGY (UYHZ-C)
GA 202111737U
AB    NOVELTY - Regulating calcium-based carbon dioxide adsorbent microstructure comprises dissolving calcium nitrate tetrahydrate and citric acid monohydrate in deionized water to obtain mixed liquid, and treating the mixed liquid in a constant temperature water bath to obtain gel, aging and drying the gel to obtain dry gel, igniting the dry gel at constant temperature, casting and calcining to obtain calcium-based carbon dioxide adsorbents with different microstructures. The constant temperature ignition temperature is controlled at 300-900 degrees C.
   USE - The method is useful for regulating calcium-based carbon dioxide adsorbent microstructure.
   ADVANTAGE - The prepared adsorbent has high carbon dioxide capture rate.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - INDEPENDENT CLAIMS are also included for:
   (1) preparing high-performance calcium-based carbon dioxide adsorbent comprising dissolving calcium nitrate tetrahydrate and citric acid monohydrate in deionized water to obtain mixed liquid, treating the mixed liquid in a constant temperature water bath to obtain gel, aging and drying the gel to obtain dry gel, igniting the dry gel at a constant temperature of 300-500 degrees C, and casting to obtain reaction material, and calcining the reaction material to obtain high-performance calcium-based carbon dioxide adsorbent; and
   (2) high-performance calcium-based carbon dioxide adsorbent prepared by above method.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - INORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Components: In the mixed solution, the molar ratio between calcium nitrate tetrahydrate, citric acid monohydrate and deionized water is 1:1:33-37. Preferred Method: The treatment in the constant temperature water bath is performed at 75-85 degrees C for 3-5 hours. The aging process is performed at 23-27 degrees C for 18-22 hours. The drying process is performed by heating 75-85 degrees C for 3-6 hours, and heating at 100-120 degrees C for 10-14 hours. The calcination is performed at 840-860 degrees C for 15-25 minutes.
DC D15 (Chemical or biological treatment of water, industrial waste and sewage - including purification, sterilising or testing water, scale prevention, treatment of sewage sludge, regeneration of active carbon which has been used for water treatment and impregnating water with gas e.g. CO2, but excluding plant and anti-pollution devices (C02).); E36 (Non-metallic elements, semi-metals (Se, Te, B, Si) and their compounds (except for E35).); J01 (Separation - including evaporation, crystallisation, solvent extraction, chromatography, dialysis, osmosis including drying gases and/or vapours, and separation of solids from gases, liquids and other solids. Isotope separation, filter materials (including molecular sieves for separation), and centrifuges (except where used for analysis) (B01D, B03, B04, B07B).)

TI Carbon dioxide underground storage system for use in greenhouse, has casing extended from upper part of ground, and heating unit arranged below ground of pipe such that amount of heating heat is reduced by geothermal heat.
AU CHAE H
AE SAMSUNG HEAVY IND CO LTD (SMSU-C)
GA 202097521S
AB    NOVELTY - The system (100) has a pump (120) arranged in the pipe and pressurizing and injecting carbon dioxide into an underground storage (30). A casing (140) is extended from an upper part of a ground to the underground storage and provided in form of a tube surrounding a pipe (150). A heat insulating portion is provided in space between the pipe and the casing, and reduces heat transfer between the pipe and the casing. A heating unit is installed on an outer circumferential surface of the pipe, and heats the carbon dioxide in the pipe. The heating unit is arranged below ground of the pipe such that amount of heating heat is reduced by geothermal heat.
   USE - Carbon dioxide underground storage system for use in a greenhouse.
   ADVANTAGE - The system injects the carbon dioxide into the underground storage by reducing viscosity of carbon dioxide at high heating efficiency and low cost.

PT P
PN CN111723482-A
TI Observing inversion surface carbon flux based on satellite carbon dioxide column concentration comprises constructing EnKF carbon flux retrieval system, obtaining prior carbon dioxide flux, and re-inputting optimized flux into MOZART4 model.
AU JIANG F
   WANG H
   CHEN J
   JU W
   FENG S
AE UNIV NANJING (UNAJ-C)
GA 202098451W
AB    NOVELTY - Observing inversion surface carbon flux based on satellite carbon dioxide column concentration comprises (i) constructing the EnKF carbon flux retrieval system and couple it to the MOZART-4 global atmospheric chemical transport model, (ii) obtaining the prior carbon dioxide flux by Gaussian random perturbation to obtain a set of samples and inputting into the atmospheric model MOZART-4 to simulate the carbon dioxide concentration, assimilating the observation data of corresponding location and time, and obtaining optimized carbon dioxide flux, and (iii) re-inputting the optimized flux into the MOZART4 model to operate, generating a novel initial field for flux optimization of the next homogenization window, and repeating step (ii) for cyclic assimilation.
   USE - The method is useful for observing inversion surface carbon flux based on satellite carbon dioxide column concentration.
   ADVANTAGE - The method: constructs high-resolution carbon assimilation inversion system through novel algorithms and programs; directly assimilates satellite column concentration data; and corrects global and regional carbon flux errors and simulation accuracy.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a schematic representation of the observing inversion surface carbon flux based on satellite carbon dioxide column concentration (Drawing includes non-English language text).
DC T01 (Digital Computers)
MC T01-J15H
IP G06F-030/20
PD CN111723482-A   29 Sep 2020   G06F-030/20   202084   Pages: 11   Chinese

PT P
PN CN108357320-A
TI Method for regulating winter temperature of public transportation vehicle, involves obtaining target temperature based on natural temperature and carbon dioxide concentration in vehicle.
AU TANG Z
AE HEFEI CHANGTIAN INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY (HEFE-Non-standard)
GA 201862930Q
AB    NOVELTY - The method involves obtaining a natural temperature and a concentration of carbon dioxide in the vehicle. A target temperature is obtained according to the natural temperature and the carbon dioxide concentration in the vehicle. The target temperature is inversely proportional to the natural temperature, and is proportional to the carbon dioxide concentration. The temperature inside the vehicle is adjusted according to the target temperature. The target temperature is calculated by substituting the natural temperature and the carbon dioxide concentration in the vehicle into a preset calculation model. The natural temperature and the carbon dioxide concentration in the vehicle are collected once every preset time value.
   USE - Method for regulating winter temperature of public transportation vehicle.
   ADVANTAGE - The data acquisition work is simplified. A foundation is laid for the simplification of the automatic adjusting work of the temperature in the vehicle. The concentration of the carbon dioxide is directly determined by the number of passengers in the vehicle, so that the density of the passengers in the vehicle is replaced by the concentration of the carbon dioxide, and the accuracy of temperature control in the vehicle is guaranteed.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a flowchart illustrating the method for adjusting the temperature of the public transport tool in winter. (Drawing includes non-English language text)

PN CN112403441-A
TI Preparing carbon dioxide solid adsorbent loaded with organic amine by chemical bond comprises carboxy activation treatment by organic solvent and carboxy modifier, dispersing mesoporous silicon dioxide, filtering and drying.
AU JIAO J
   GUAN Z
   LI W
   SUN G
   WEI X
AE UNIV NORTHWESTERN POLYTECHNICAL (UNWP-C)
GA 202123638D
AB    NOVELTY - Preparing carbon dioxide solid adsorbent loaded with organic amine by chemical bond comprises adding organic solvent to carboxy modifier for performing carboxy activation treatment to obtain mixed liquid I, dispersing the mesoporous silicon dioxide in an organic solvent, mixing with mixed liquid I to obtain mixed liquid II, heating the mixed liquid II for refluxing while stirring, filtering and drying to obtain mesoporous silicon dioxide modified with surface carboxy groups, where the molar ratio of mesoporous silicon dioxide to carboxy modifier is 90-98:2-10, adding mesoporous silicon dioxide modified with surface carboxy groups to organic amine solution to obtain mixed liquid III, and continuing stirring at 40-60 degrees C under inert conditions for 4-8 hours to obtain mixed liquid IV, where the organic amine solution is prepared by organic amine and organic solvent in a mass ratio of 1:10-15, and drying.
   USE - The method is useful for preparing carbon dioxide solid adsorbent loaded with organic amine by chemical bond.
   ADVANTAGE - The adsorbent: is highly efficient and stable; has larger pore size; can increase the amount of carbon dioxide captured; improves the stability of solid amine adsorbent; can support the uniform distribution of the organic amine in the pores; can improve the solid loading capacity of the organic amine on the carrier, and circulation and stability of the adsorbent.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - Preparing carbon dioxide solid adsorbent loaded with organic amine by chemical bond comprises (a) adding an organic solvent to carboxy modifier for performing carboxy activation treatment to obtain mixed liquid I, (b) dispersing the mesoporous silicon dioxide in an organic solvent, mixing with mixed liquid I to obtain mixed liquid II, heating the mixed liquid II for refluxing while stirring, filtering and drying to obtain mesoporous silicon dioxide modified with surface carboxy groups, where the molar ratio of mesoporous silicon dioxide to carboxy modifier is 90-98:2-10, (c) adding mesoporous silicon dioxide modified with surface carboxy groups to organic amine solution to obtain mixed liquid III, and continuing stirring at 40-60 degrees C under inert conditions for 4-8 hours to obtain mixed liquid IV, where the organic amine solution is prepared by organic amine and organic solvent in a mass ratio of 1:10-15, and the mass ratio of organic amine to mesoporous silicon dioxide modified with surface carboxy groups is 20-70:30-80, and (d) drying. An INDEPENDENT CLAIM is also included for carbon dioxide solid adsorbent prepared by the above method.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - ORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Components: The carboxy modifier is gamma -aminopropyltriethoxysilane and succinic anhydride in a molar ratio of 1:1.05-1.1, or (3-triethoxysilylpropyl)-succinic anhydride. The organic amine is monoethanolamine, diethanolamine, N-methyldiethanolamine, diethylenetriamine, triethylenetetramine, tetraethylenepentamine and/or polyethyleneimine. The organic solvent in the organic amine solution is ethanol, dimethylformamide, methanol, and/or water. The mesoporous silicon dioxide is SBA-15, MCM-41, HMS, MSU, and/or KIT-A. Preferred Method: The activation treatment in the step (a) is carried out by mixing organic solvent and carboxy modifier in a mass ratio of 50-100:1, then using a cycle of 15-30 minutes of ultrasonic by magnetically stirring for 3 times. The organic solvent is N,N-dimethylformamide (DMF), toluene, tetrahydrofuran, absolute ethanol, and/or water. The heating and refluxing in the step (b) is carried out at 60-120 degrees C for 6-8 hours. The step (b) comprises pretreating the mesoporous silicon dioxide at 100-120 degrees C under vacuum conditions for 2-4 hours before being dispersed in an organic solvent, where the organic solvent is N,N-dimethylformamide (DMF), toluene, tetrahydrofuran, absolute ethanol, and/or water. The step (c) comprises pretreating the surface carboxy modified mesoporous silicon dioxide at 100 degrees C under vacuum conditions for 3 hours before mixing with the organic amine solution. The step (d) comprises rotary evaporating the mixed solution IV with 1/3-2/3 volume of organic solvent, then placing at 60-100 degrees C and drying for 10-14 hours under vacuum conditions.

PT P
PN CN111234855-A
TI Replacing petroleum crude oil with liquefied coal by self-hydrogenation of clean coal comprises e.g. performing carbon monoxide shift reaction, heating carbon dioxide and hydrogen, mixing petroleum heavy oil and iron catalyst, and reacting.
AU YU K
AE GUANGDONG RUNFENG IND CO LTD (GUAN-Non-standard)
GA 202052665S
AB    NOVELTY - Replacing petroleum crude oil with liquefied coal by self-hydrogenation of clean coal comprises e.g. (i) carrying out carbon monoxide shift reaction, heating carbon monoxide and water, and (ii) (a) adding obtained carbon dioxide and hydrogen into primary heater, adding coal slurry into primary heater, and transferring to coal liquefaction reactor, (b) adding petroleum heavy oil and iron catalyst into coal liquefaction reactor, circulating petroleum heavy oil, iron catalyst and coal slurry, and heating by secondary heater and primary circulation pump, and converting coal slurry into unsaturated liquid, and carbon dioxide into carbon monoxide gas, (c) passing through condenser and gas-liquid separator, filtering reacted liquid material by filter press, and (d) storing carbon monoxide separated from gas-liquid separator in gas tank, transferring part of carbon monoxide to section of reaction through compressor, depressurizing the other part of carbon monoxide by pressure reducer.
   USE - The method is useful for replacing petroleum crude oil with liquefied coal by self-hydrogenation of clean coal.
   ADVANTAGE - The method: has low equipment requirement, and low production cost.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - Replacing petroleum crude oil with liquefied coal by self-hydrogenation of clean coal comprises (i) carrying out carbon monoxide shift reaction, heating carbon monoxide and water in the environment of ferrous oxide catalyst at not greater than 450 degrees C to obtain carbon dioxide and hydrogen, and (ii) (a) adding carbon dioxide and hydrogen obtained in step (i) into primary heater, then adding coal slurry into primary heater, then heating at 300 degrees C, and transferring to coal liquefaction reactor, (b) adding petroleum heavy oil and iron catalyst into coal liquefaction reactor, circulating petroleum heavy oil, iron catalyst and coal slurry, and heating by secondary heater and primary circulation pump, and when the reaction temperature is 400-450 degrees C, converting coal slurry into unsaturated liquid, and carbon dioxide into carbon monoxide gas, (c) passing through condenser and gas-liquid separator, then filtering out completely reacted liquid material by filter press in which reactant coal ash and solid impurities are residues, and filtrate is unsaturated product, and (d) storing carbon monoxide separated from gas-liquid separator in gas tank, transferring part of carbon monoxide to section of reaction through compressor as raw material, then depressurizing the other part of carbon monoxide by pressure reducer and use as power fuel for one-stage reaction and two-stage translation.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - INORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Method: In step (c), the material separated by gas-liquid separator further includes incompletely reacted material, which are added into primary heater through secondary circulation pump, and reacted again. In step (b), the reaction pressure is 1.2-1.5 MPa, and reaction time is 4-6 minutes.

TI Offgas treatment apparatus of fertilizer manufacturing plant for processing off gas containing ammonia, has stripper that removes ammonia and carbon dioxide dissolved in absorption liquid from absorption liquid extracted from scrubber.
AU TACHIBANA S
   TANAKA Y
   HAGIMOTO A
AE MITSUBISHI HEAVY IND ENG LTD (MITO-C)
GA 202085517T
AB    NOVELTY - The apparatus (80) has an ammonia scrubber (80B) that brings the absorption liquid containing carbonated water into gas-liquid contact with the off-gas. A stripper removes ammonia and carbon dioxide dissolved in the absorption liquid from the absorption liquid extracted from the ammonia scrubber. A carbonated water manufacturing apparatus (116) manufactures the carbonated water from a carbon dioxide and water. A pressure reducer (130) pressure-reduces the carbonated water manufactured in the carbonated water manufacturing apparatus to atmospheric pressure. The carbonated water flowed out the pressure reducer supplied to the ammonia scrubber. A dust scrubber removes solid components from the off-gas by gas-liquid contact with the cleaning solution before flowing into the ammonia scrubber. The absorption liquid in which ammonia and carbon dioxide are removed in the stripper is supplied as a portion of the cleaning liquid of the dust scrubber.
   USE - Offgas treatment apparatus of fertilizer manufacturing plant (claimed) for processing off gas containing ammonia.
   ADVANTAGE - The off gas containing ammonia can be processed without generating an ammonium sulfate. The manufacturing cost of the fertilizer in a fertilizer manufacturing plant can be reduced. The influence on the ammonia production catalyst resulting from a carbon oxide can be inhibited. The removal efficiency of ammonia in the ammonia scrubber can be improved.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - The ammonia scrubber includes an absorption liquid circulation line for extracting the absorption liquid stored therein and returning it to the gas phase in the ammonia scrubber. The carbonated water is supplied to the absorption liquid circulation line. A cooling device cools the carbonated water supplied to the ammonia scrubber and cools the absorption liquid flowing through the absorption liquid circulation line. The carbonated water is separately supplied from two or more different positions in the height direction of the ammonia scrubber. An INDEPENDENT CLAIM is included for a fertilizer manufacturing plant, has an ammonia production unit that produces ammonia from the raw material gas. A urea production unit produces an aqueous urea solution by reacting the ammonia with carbon dioxide. A urea granulation unit produces granular solid urea from the urea aqueous solution and the off-gas generated from the urea granulation unit is treated. The ammonia and the carbon dioxide removed from the absorption liquid in the stripper are supplied to the urea production unit.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a block diagram of the offgas treatment apparatus of the fertilizer manufacturing plant. (Drawing includes non-English language text)

TI Power system used for reducing carbon dioxide intensity of power plant, has controller configured to control supply of gas turbine (GT) glue gas to GT flue gas inputs of boiler system based on oxygen level measured by oxygen sensor.
AU WU S
   KUKOSKI A
   FUKUIZUMI Y
AE MITSUBISHI HITACHI POWER SYSTEMS EURO (MIBI-C)
   MITSUBISHI POWER AMERICAS INC (MIBI-C)
GA 202003686A
AB    NOVELTY - The power system (100) includes a boiler system (103), a GT system (109), and a controller (401). The boiler system includes a boiler (104), an oxygen sensor (444), and multiple GT flue gas inputs (180,214,216,218,220). The GT flue gas inputs include a GT flue gas boiler hopper input (220) of the boiler, and a GT flue gas mill air supply duct input (216) which is included in a mill air supply duct (209) for supplying air to a mill (102) providing fuel (224) to the boiler. The controller is configured to control the supply of GT flue gas to the GT flue gas inputs of the boiler system based on the oxygen level measured by the oxygen sensor.
   USE - Power system used for reducing the carbon dioxide intensity of a power plant. Can be used to any power plants with existing GT units in the vicinity of the coal-fired units, or power plants where there is space for building new GT or gas turbine combined cycle (GTCC) units that are integrated with the coal-fired units.
   ADVANTAGE - Provides a power system that integrates a GT and a boiler to effectively utilize the waste heat of the GT exhaust, thus ensuring higher plant efficiency than the combined efficiency of a standalone coal-fired power plant and a standalone natural gas-fired GT power plant. Reduces the carbon dioxide intensity of the power plant by thermal efficiency improvement and by utilizing natural gas which emits less carbon dioxide per unit heating value than coal. Facilitates more efficient and less expensive capture of GT generated carbon dioxide. Ensures that the integrated natural gas turbine-coal fired boiler power plant system utilizes captured heat energy to generate power. Provides an effective way to reduce carbon dioxide intensity and extend the service life of existing coal power plants.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a schematic diagram illustrating an integrated GT-coal fired boiler system, in which cold GT exhaust output from a heat recovery system generator is injected into boiler related flows.

PN CN112655459-A
TI Performing high-yield method of Pleurotus eryngii            in northern high cold area involves measuring sawdust,            corn cob particles, bran, soybean meal, corn flour,            light calcium carbonate, and quicklime.
AU DENG S
AE JILIN SHENGGU BIOTECHNOLOGY CO LTD (JILI-Non-standard)
GA 202145263P
AB    NOVELTY - Performing high-yield method of Pleurotus                eryngii in northern high cold area involves                measuring 20-25 pts. wt. of sawdust, 25-40 pts. wt.                of corn cob particles, 19-21 pts. wt. of bran, 9-10                pts. wt. of soybean meal, 8-10 pts. wt. of corn                flour, 0.5-1.5 pts. wt. of light calcium carbonate,                0.5-1.0 pts. wt. of quicklime, and putting sawdust                and corn cob pellets as the main materials into the                hopper, and using the pre-wet treatment for 10-12                hours for later use. The bran, corn flour, soybean                meal, quicklime, light calcium carbonate is used as                a concentrate according to the composition ratio                and mixed with the main ingredients to prepare a                culture medium, the water content of the culture                medium is controlled at 64-68 wt.%, and the pH                value is controlled at 8.6-9.5. The prepared                culture medium is bagged to obtain the required                bacteria bag. The bacteria is packed into a                sterilization basket, and placed the sterilization                basket in an autoclave for 120 minutes to                sterilize.
   USE - The method is useful for cultivating Pleurotus                eryngii in northern high cold region.
   ADVANTAGE - The method improves the nutrition of Pleurotus                eryngii, taste, quality and yield.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - Performing high-yield method of Pleurotus                eryngii in northern high cold area involves                measuring 20-25 pts. wt. of sawdust, 25-40 pts. wt.                of corn cob particles, 19-21 pts. wt. of bran, 9-10                pts. wt. of soybean meal, 8-10 pts. wt. of corn                flour, 0.5-1.5 pts. wt. of light calcium carbonate,                0.5-1.0 pts. wt. of quicklime, and putting sawdust                and corn cob pellets as the main materials into the                hopper, and using the pre-wet treatment for 10-12                hours for later use. The bran, corn flour, soybean                meal, quicklime, light calcium carbonate is used as                a concentrate according to the composition ratio                and mixed with the main ingredients to prepare a                culture medium, the water content of the culture                medium is controlled at 64-68 wt.%, and the pH                value is controlled at 8.6-9.5. The prepared                culture medium is bagged to obtain the required                bacteria bag. The bacteria is packed into a                sterilization basket, and placed the sterilization                basket in an autoclave for 120 minutes to                sterilize, and after sterilization, placed the                bacteria bag in a 10,000-level clean cooling room                for forced cooling for 12-15 hours, and after                sterilization, and the pH value of the culture                medium in the bacteria bag is controlled at 6-6.5.                The center temperature of the bacteria bag is                controlled at 20-24 degrees C and performed the                inoculation operation, and before inoculation, the                entire inoculation pipeline, the inoculation gun                and the bacterial seed transportation pipeline                shall be sterilized, and after that, used an                inoculation gun to inoculate each bacterial bag,                and the inoculation amount per kilogram of medium                in the bacterial bag is controlled at 30-35 cubic                centimeter. The inoculated bacteria bag is placed                on the culture rack and transport it to the                colonization warehouse for 10-12 days. The                temperature is controlled at 22-24 degrees C, and                the humidity is at 60-65. The carbon dioxide                concentration is controlled at 2000-3000 pts. wt.                per million. The entire culture stage is cultivated                without light. The cultured bacterial bags are                transferred to the fruiting room, and the                non-polluting bacterial bags are selected and                placed on the fruiting grid for fruiting. The                fruiting is divided into three stages, and set                different space temperature, humidity, light and                ventilation at different stages. The first stage is                ten days, which are as follows: the first day's                spatial temperature is 13-15 degrees C in summer                and 14-16 degrees C in winter. The developmental                state is cold stimulation, and the cover is                removed. The space temperature on the second and                third days is 15-17 degrees C in summer and 16-18                degrees C in winter. The development state is the                recovery of mycelium on the material surface and                the loop is pulled. The space temperature on the                fourth and fifth days is 15-17 degrees C. The                developmental state is that the mycelium of the                material surface begins to kink, the space                temperature is 15-17 degrees C, and the space                humidity is 60-70%. The third stage is four days,                and includes the first day the space temperature is                13-15 degrees C, the space humidity is 75-85%,                there is no light, and the ventilation conditions                are to control the carbon dioxide concentration at                2500-4000 pts. wt. per million. The developmental                state is sparse buds, the next day the spatial                temperature is 13-15 degrees C, and the spatial                humidity is 60-80%, and there is no light, the                ventilation conditions are to control the carbon                dioxide concentration at 2500-3500 pts. wt. per                miliion, and the development state is challenging,                and on the third day, the space temperature is                12-14 degrees C, the space humidity is 60-80%,                there is no light, and the ventilation conditions                are to control the carbon dioxide concentration at                2500-3500 pts. wt. per million. The harvested                Pleurotus eryngii is transported to the packaging                workshop in a turnover basket for mushroom cutting,                grading and packaging operations, and after                vacuuming, it is tied and sent to the cold storage.                The space temperature of the packaging workshop is                maintained at 10-13 degrees C during operation, and                the temperature of the cold storage is controlled                at 1-4 degrees C.
DC D16 (Fermentation industry - including fermentation equipment, brewing, yeast production, production of pharmaceuticals and other chemicals by fermentation, microbiology, production of vaccines and antibodies, cell and tissue culture and genetic engineering.); P13 (Plant culture, dairy products (A01G, H, J).)

TI Recycling ecological agriculture system comprises microbial fermentation unit, edible fungus cultivation unit, biological substrate production unit, seedling planting unit, aquaculture unit, and greenhouse vegetable cultivation unit.
AU CHEN H
   YU W
   CHEN Y
   WANG Y
   SU M
   MAO F
   LUO Q
   LIU Q
   WENG B
AE FUJIAN ACAD AGRIC SCI (IAMV-C)
GA 2019050654
AB    NOVELTY - Recycling ecological agriculture system comprises microbial fermentation unit, edible fungus cultivation unit, biological substrate production unit, seedling planting unit, aquaculture unit, greenhouse vegetable cultivation unit, and fruit tree planting unit. The microbial fermentation unit comprises pig breeding room, pig house, automatic environment control device for the pig house, a micro-spray disinfection system, automatic feeding system for probiotics, an automatic drinking water system for probiotics, and an in-situ fermentation bed. The pig big bar breeding house is constructed by a separable railing and steel frame structure, which is covered with color steel tile roof, foam layer insulation is added, the roof is equipped with a non-powered fan, and an axial fan is installed in the roof to promote the pig house and internal air circulation. The longitudinal wall surface is closed by adjustable roller blinds.
   USE - Used as recycling ecological agriculture system.
   ADVANTAGE - The system realizes high rate circulatory ecological agriculture high investment and high yield.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - Recycling ecological agriculture system comprises microbial fermentation unit, edible fungus cultivation unit, biological substrate production unit, seedling planting unit, aquaculture unit, greenhouse vegetable cultivation unit, and fruit tree planting unit. The microbial fermentation unit comprises pig breeding room, pig house, automatic environment control device for the pig house, a micro-spray disinfection system, automatic feeding system for probiotics, an automatic drinking water system for probiotics, and an in-situ fermentation bed. The pig big bar breeding house is constructed by a separable railing and steel frame structure, which is covered with color steel tile roof, foam layer insulation is added, the roof is equipped with a non-powered fan, and an axial fan is installed in the roof to promote the pig house and internal air circulation. The longitudinal wall surface is closed by adjustable roller blinds, the horizontal wall surface is installed with water curtain and cooling fan, the ground cement is hardened, and the pig penn is set with a 1.5 meter wide feeding platform in the longitudinal direction, and the feeding platform is provided with a fully automatic feeding system. The pig house environment automatic control device comprises a light intensity, temperature, water quantity, humidity, air volume environmental factor control module, and the micro-spray disinfection system utilizes Bacillus sterilization to perform periodic environmental biological control by an automated micro-spray system. The probiotic feed automatic feeding system uses probiotics to be added to the feed, and the whole process of pig feeding is realized by an automatic feeding system, and the probiotic added automatic drinking water system is added to the pig drinking water by the Bacillus probiotics and realizing automatic drinking water control, the in-situ fermentation bed is arranged at the bottom of the pigpen, and finally the biological fertilizer is produced by fermentation using microbial padding, the microbial padding includes coco peat, chaff, sawdust, shavings, corn cob a block and corn stover, and the coco peat is a fiber strip, the chaff does not need to be comminuted, and performing artificial waste humus in situ by the excrement. The biological fertilizer produced by the microbial fermentation unit is transported to the edible fungus cultivation unit by a transport mechanism, and the edible fungus cultivation unit uses the fermentation litter of the microbial fermentation unit as a main raw material. The production method of simulating ecological environment, intelligent control, and automated mechanical operation is integrated, and the waste material produced by the edible fungus cultivation unit is returned to the biological substrate production unit for comprehensive utilization; the biological substrate production unit includes biological fertilizer from Heating tunnel fermentation device, biological matrix automatic formulating device, automatic packaging inspection device and automatic production line, in-situ fermented mature padding of the pig pen house, and through the harmless treatment and fermentation of the tunnel self-heating fermentation device, the formula is adjusted according to the growth requirements of different crops and inoculated with biocontrol bacteria for solid fermentation and producing a dedicated biological substrate for the seedling planting unit, the greenhouse vegetable cultivation unit, the fruit tree planting unit, and the automated production line first fermenting the matted litter first. The microbial fermentation self-heating sterilization is carried out, the harmless treatment is carried out without using external heating, and then the bio-bacteria is inoculated for secondary fermentation, and the automated production line includes an automatic dosing unit, a mixing unit, a crushing unit, fermentation unit, drying unit, granulating unit, screening unit, packaging unit, robot palletizing unit and winding unit, and realize automatic computer control and data acquisition of all parameters in each production stage through automatic integration system. The seedling planting unit comprises an electric top butterfly window opening system, a side electric natural ventilation system, a high pressure spray cooling system, an electric internal shading system, a natural gas heating and carbon dioxide fertilization system, an axial fan air circulation system, and a closed pest control system. A system, a warm-light wet carbon dioxide monitoring system, an inlet and outlet air purification system, the electric top butterfly window opening system, the side electric natural ventilation system, the high pressure spray cooling system, the electric internal shading system, the natural gas a heating and carbon dioxide fertilization system, the axial fan air circulation system, the closed insect control system, the warm light and wet carbon dioxide monitoring system, and the inlet and outlet air purification systems are automatically controlled by a computer linkage.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a schematic representation of the recycling ecological agriculture system.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - INSTRUMENTATION AND TESTING - Preferred Components: The aquaculture unit comprises a family farm production type standardization tank, a water pollution monitoring and pollution treatment equipment, an aquaculture biological filtration device, an aquaculture automatic aeration device, an aquaculture automatic feeding device, an aquaculture automatic fishing device, and the aquaculture unit is produced by a coupling method of aquaculture and crop nutrient film cultivation. The main body structure of the greenhouse vegetable cultivation unit and the fruit tree planting unit is constructed by a modular assembly process, and the greenhouse vegetable cultivation unit and the fruit tree planting unit comprise a computer automatic control system, a natural ventilation cooling system, and a micro-injection aeration, a cooling system, integrated water and fertilizer system, substrate cultivation system, nutrient liquid film cultivation system, supporting nursery system and water purification system. The biological substrate production unit produces a dedicated biological substrate to be delivered to the seedling planting unit by an automatic conveying mechanism, the greenhouse vegetable cultivation unit, the fruit tree planting unit, the edible mushroom cultivation unit, and the microbial fermentation unit. The biological fertilizer produced by the microbial fermentation unit is transported to the edible fungus cultivation unit or the fruit tree planting unit by a transport mechanism. The seedlings after the seedling planting unit is directly transported to the fruit tree planting unit by the automatic conveying structure, and the aquaculture unit can be used as the water source of the fruit tree planting unit and the greenhouse vegetable cultivation unit. The automatic conveying mechanism is centrally connected to the controller of the central control room and is automatically controlled by distributed control system.

PT P
PN CN114304449-A
TI Sea-buckthorn juice comprises fruit juice, seed juice, preservative, edible colloid and purified water, juice meat is prepared by taking fresh sea-buckthorn fruit to clean, removing seeds, adding water, pulping and filtering to obtain the fruit residue and pulp.
AU HAN X
   LU C
   ZHANG Z
   KONG D
   CHENG P
   LI H
   ZHENG X
   ZHAO Y
AE ZHAO Y (ZHAO-Individual)
GA 202256679S
AB    NOVELTY - Sea-buckthorn juice comprises 200-500 pts. wt. fruit juice, 20-40 pts. wt. seed juice, 1-10 pts. wt. preservative, 1-8 pts. wt. edible colloid and 200-500 pts. wt. purified water. The juice meat is prepared by taking fresh sea-buckthorn fruit to clean, removing seeds, adding water, pulping, filtering to obtain the fruit residue and pulp, mixing the fruit residue and sorghum powder uniformly, adding water and stirring uniformly, moistening material for 1-2h, wetting the material at normal pressure for 2-3h, discharging and cooling to 21-26degrees Celsius, accessing the yeast, putting into the fermentation tank for the first time fermentation under the condition of 25-27degrees Celsius, fermenting for 3-5 days, adding seabuckthorn seed meal and vinegar in the fermentation tank and fermenting for the second time at 27-29degrees Celsius.
   USE - Sea-buckthorn juice.
   ADVANTAGE - The seed juice and the pulp juice are prepared by unique process, and the seed juice and the pulp juice can be fully fused through extraction, fermentation and pulping, so that the prepared sea buckthorn juice is not layered, has stable properties, fully preserves the nutrition of sea buckthorn fruits and is easier to be absorbed by human bodies.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - Sea-buckthorn juice comprises 200-500 pts. wt. fruit juice, 20-40 pts. wt. seed juice, 1-10 pts. wt. preservative, 1-8 pts. wt. edible colloid and 200-500 pts. wt. purified water. The juice meat is prepared by taking fresh sea-buckthorn fruit to clean, removing seeds, adding water, pulping, filtering to obtain the fruit residue and pulp, mixing the fruit residue and sorghum powder uniformly, adding water and stirring uniformly, moistening material for 1-2h, wetting the material at normal pressure for 2-3h, discharging and cooling to 21-26degrees Celsius, accessing the yeast, putting into the fermentation tank for the first time fermentation under the condition of 25-27degrees Celsius, fermenting for 3-5 days, adding seabuckthorn seed meal and vinegar in the fermentation tank and fermenting for the second time at 27-29degrees Celsius, turning once every day in the secondary fermentation process, after secondary fermentation for 3-4 days, filtering, uniformly mixing the obtained filtrate with the primary pulp to obtain the pulp juice. The seed juice is prepared by taking seabuckthorn seed crushing and sieving with 20 meshes sieve to obtain powder, putting the powder into the supercritical extraction kettle, and introducing supercritical carbon dioxide fluid at the temperature of 35-38degrees Celsius, the pressure is 30-35MPa, carbon dioxide flow 50L/h under the condition of extracting for 50-60 min, so as to obtain seed oil, taking whey protein and distilled water into the magnetic stirrer to fully stir at room temperature, making it fully hydrated to obtain the protein solution, the mass concentration of the whey protein in the hydrated solution is 4-8 %, taking seed oil according to the mass ratio of 10-15: 1-5: 90-120, putting the protein solution and purified water into the high speed disperser, stirring in the high speed disperser, emulsifying for 50-60 min to obtain the seed juice, the rotating speed of the high speed disperser is 8-10r/min.
   An INDEPENDENT CLAIM is included for a method for preparing sea-buckthorn juice, which involves taking fresh sea-buckthorn fruit cleaning, removing seed, adding water, pulping, then filtering to obtain the fruit residue and raw pulp, uniformly mixing the fruit residue and sorghum flour, adding water and stirring uniformly, moistening material for 1-2h, wetting the material at normal pressure for 2-3h, then discharging and cooling to 21-26degrees Celsius, accessing the yeast, putting into the fermentation tank for the first time fermentation under the condition of 25-27degrees Celsius, fermenting for 3-5 days at one time, adding seabuckthorn seed meal and vinegar in the fermentation tank and fermenting for the second time at 27-29degrees Celsius, turning once every day in the secondary fermentation process, after secondary fermentation for 3-4 days, filtering, uniformly mixing the obtained filter liquid with the raw pulp to obtain the pulp juice, crushing the seabuckthorn seed and sieving with 20-mesh sieve to obtain powder, putting the powder into the supercritical extraction kettle, and introducing supercritical carbon dioxide fluid at the temperature of 35-38degrees Celsius, pressure 30-35MPa, carbon dioxide flow 50L/h under the condition of extracting for 50-60 min, so as to obtain seed oil, taking whey protein and distilled water into the magnetic stirrer to fully stir at room temperature, making it fully hydrated to obtain the protein solution, the mass concentration of the whey protein in the hydrated solution is 4-8 %, taking the seed oil according to the mass ratio of 10-15: 1-5: 90-120, putting the protein solution and purified water into the high speed disperser, stirring in the high speed disperser, emulsifying for 50-60-60 hours to obtain the seed juice, the rotating speed of the high speed dispersion 8-10r/min, taking 200-500 pts. wt. fruit juice, 20-40 pts. wt. seed juice, 1-10 pts. wt. preservative, 1-8 pts. wt. edible colloid and 200-500 pts. wt. purified water, putting the raw material into the homogenizer, the temperature is 55-60degrees Celsius, pressure is 22-26Mpa the condition of homogenizing, immediately canning and sealing, sterilizing for 20-25 min at 105-115degrees Celsius, cooling to obtain the sea-buckthorn juice.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - FOOD - Preferred Components: The edible colloid is one or the mixture of more than two of carrageenin, gellan gum, locust bean gum, sodium alginate or xanthan gum. The preservative is one or the mixture of more than two of potassium sorbate and sodium dehydroacetate.
DC A97 (Miscellaneous goods not specified elsewhere - including papermaking, gramophone records, detergents, food and oil well applications.); D13 (Other foodstuffs and treatment - including preservation of food, milk, milk products, butter substitutes, edible oils and fats, non-alcoholic beverages, artificial sweeteners, food additives and animal feed (A23B-L).); D16 (Fermentation industry - including fermentation equipment, brewing, yeast production, production of pharmaceuticals and other chemicals by fermentation, microbiology, production of vaccines and antibodies, cell and tissue culture and genetic engineering.); D23 (Oils, fats and waxes - including fatty acids, essential oils, but excluding butter (substitutes) and montan wax (C11B, C).)

PN IN201921019957-A; IN331895-B; WO2020234901-A1; EP3972720-A1
TI Bio gas upgradation system with reduced methane slippage comprises pre-treatment unit including e.g. bio gas inlet, activated carbon filter and pre-cooler, a drying unit, methane enrichment unit and a methane recovery unit.
AU SINGH B R
   TARAPORE N H
AE ATMOS POWER PRIVATE LTD (ATMO-Non-standard)
   ATMOS POWER PRIVATE LTD (ATMO-Non-standard)
   ATMOS POWER PVT LTD (ATMO-Non-standard)
   ATMOS POWER PVT LTD (ATMO-Non-standard)
GA 201971999C
AB    NOVELTY - Bio gas upgradation system with reduced methane slippage comprises: a pre-treatment unit (1), a drying unit (2), a methane enrichment unit (3), and a methane recovery unit (4) where the pre-treatment unit includes a bio gas inlet (11) for feeding a raw bio gas stream into a blower that sucks and pressurizes the raw bio gas stream up to 0.7 bar g from the bio gas inlet, an activated carbon filter (ACF) receives the raw bio gas stream through the blower for removing hydrogen sulfide, a pre-cooler for reducing the temperature of the pretreated hydrogen sulfide free bio gas coming from the ACF, the drying unit includes a moisture separator (MS) to remove water vapor from the cooled bio gas obtained from the pre-cooler, a pair of drying tower for removing residual water vapor from the cooled bio gas obtained from the MS.
   USE - Used as bio gas upgradation system.
   ADVANTAGE - The system exhibits reduced methane slippage, and extract maximum amount of methane from the raw biogas and offer it as fuel grade methane, has buffer balloon, reduced energy consumption, high production efficiency and low equipment cost and reduces methane slippage to less than 1% and thus, makes the process more financially viable for the producer.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - Bio gas upgradation system with reduced methane slippage comprises: a pre-treatment unit (1), a drying unit (2), a methane enrichment unit (3), and a methane recovery unit (4) where the pre-treatment unit includes a bio gas inlet (11) for feeding a raw bio gas stream into a blower that sucks and pressurizes the raw bio gas stream up to 0.7 bar g from the bio gas inlet, an activated carbon filter (ACF) receives the raw bio gas stream through the blower for removing hydrogen sulfide, a pre-cooler for reducing the temperature of the pretreated hydrogen sulfide free bio gas coming from the ACF, the drying unit includes a moisture separator (MS) to remove water vapor from the cooled bio gas obtained from the pre-cooler, a pair of drying tower for removing residual water vapor from the cooled bio gas obtained from the MS, the methane enrichment unit includes a pair of (medium pressure swing adsorption) MPSA tower for extracting methane from the dried bio gas coming out from the drying tower, a bio gas surge tank for collecting product gas, which is rich in methane obtained from the MPSA tower. The methane recovery unit includes a vacuum suction port (VSP) for conveying the exhaust steam coming out from the drying tower and the MPSA tower to a vacuum discharge port (VDP) through a vacuum pump, a bio gas buffer balloon to store the exhaust stream coming out from the VDP through vacuum pump, a blower that sucks and pressurizes the stored exhaust bio gas stream from the bio gas buffer balloon, a pre-cooler for reducing the temperature of stored bio gas coming out from the bio gas buffer balloon, a MS for removing water vapor from the cooled gas obtained from the pre-cooler, a pair of MPSA tower for extracting remaining amount of methane obtained from the dried bio gas stream of the MS, a bio gas surge tank for collecting persisting amount of methane. An INDEPENDENT CLAIM is also included for upgrading bio gas with reduced methane slippage, comprising introducing the raw bio gas feed stream from the bio gas inlet through the blower into the ACF for removal of the hydrogen sulfide, feeding the pre-treated hydrogen sulfide free bio gas to the pre-cooler for reducing the temperature of the pre-treated bio gas, feeding the cooled bio gas from the pre-cooler into the MS for removal of water vapor, conveying the partially dried bio gas from the MS to the drying tower for residual water removal; e) directing the dried bio gas from the drying tower to the MPSA tower for adsorbing the carbon dioxide into the molecular sieve by applying pressure, conveying the separated methane into the bio gas surge tank from the MPSA tower, collecting the separated product gas, which is rich in methane form the bio gas surge tank and compressing it according to its end use, desorbing the carbon dioxide adsorbed by the molecular sieves in the MPSA towers by depressurizing the active MPSA tower, directing the exhaust stream of the MPSA tower, and the drying tower to the VSP through the vacuum pump, directing further the exhaust stream through the VSP to the VDP, storing the combined exhaust stream obtained from the VDP into the bio gas buffer balloon, conveying the stored bio gas into the pre-cooler for reducing the temperature, conveying the cooled bio gas from the pre-cooler into the MS for residual moisture removal, directing the dried bio gas into the MPSA tower for extracting the remaining methane by adsorbing the carbon dioxide into the molecular sieve, the desorbed carbon dioxide from the MPSA tower is collected/vented through an exhaust by releasing the applied pressure, directing the extracted methane from bio gas surge tank to the blower, re-circulating the extracted methane.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The figure illustrates schematic view of the biogas upgradation plant with reduced methane slippage.
   Pre-treatment unit (1)
   Drying unit (2)
   Methane enrichment unit (3)
   Methane recovery unit (4)
   Bio gas inlet (11)

PN CN114856743-A
TI Carbon dioxide medium engine, has liquid inlet            passage that is connected between carbon dioxide            storage bottle and inlet of cylinder, and air outlet            control valve arranged at joint of exhaust passage, and            cylinder is fixed on top of piston.
AU NING Q
   SHEN N
AE SHEN N (SHEN-Individual)
GA 2022A41350
AB    NOVELTY - The engine has a piston that is fixed in a                cylinder. A connecting rod is connected with the                piston. A crankshaft is fixed with an outer end of                the connecting rod. A liquid carbon dioxide storage                bottle, an air pump, a liquid inlet passage and an                exhaust passage are fixed in the cylinder. The                cylinder is fixed on a top portion of the piston                that is provided with a liquid outlet and an air                outlet. The liquid outlet of the cylinder is                communicated with the liquid inlets of the                cylinders. The exhaust passage is connected between                the air outlet and the air inlet of the air                pump.
   USE - Carbon dioxide medium engine i.e. four-stroke                gasoline engine. Can also be used for a two-stroke                petrol engine and a diesel engine.
   ADVANTAGE - The expansion energy generated by carbon                dioxide phase change can greatly improve the heat                efficiency of the engine, compared with the                traditional fuel transmitter, it reduces the loss                of engine and improves the working efficiency. The                carbon dioxide medium engine uses the phase change                of carbon dioxide to provide power for the movement                of the piston, which is a brand-new technology for                using carbon dioxide clean energy for engine. The                reciprocating movement of piston in the cylinder by                the connection relation of the liquid carbon                dioxide, the cylinder and the air pump, the                structure is simple, the travel is short, only 4                milliseconds is needed to finish one working                stroke. The same displacement torque is increased                by more than one time.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a structural diagram of a                carbon dioxide medium engine.

TI Preparing layered double hydroxide micro-nano            colloid plating solution involves preparing salt            solution as solution A under protection of oxygen-free            carbon dioxide and nitrogen, ammonia-ammonium chloride            buffer solution as solution B, and concentrated ammonia            water as solution C.
AU HE K
   LI Y
   JIANG B
   XI F
   LU X
   LI J
   QI Y
AE UNIV QINGDAO TECHNOLOGY (UQDT-C)
GA 202256503N
AB    NOVELTY - Preparing layered double hydroxide micro-nano                colloid plating solution involves preparing M2 +                -M3 + salt solution as solution A under the                protection of oxygen-free carbon dioxide and                nitrogen, ammonia-ammonium chloride buffer solution                as solution B, concentrated ammonia water as                solution C, adding A solution and C solution into                the B solution in the absence of oxygen and carbon                dioxide and under the protection of nitrogen,                standing and aging after reaction, centrifuging the                product, washing, ad drying to obtain                carbonate-free LDH solid, dispersing the LDH solid                in the mixed solution of acid and salt, shaking to                obtain product.
   USE - Method for preparing layered double hydroxide                micro-nano colloid plating solution.
   ADVANTAGE - The method has high purity, regular appearance                structure, and very wide application                prospect.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - INORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Conditions: The liquid A pH is                  1-2, the molar ratio of M2 +: M3 + is (2-5):1,                  the bivalent M2 + salt and trivalent M3 +salt are                  dissolved in acidifying and boiling decarbonated,                  deionized water A liquid. The pH value of the                  solution B is 11-13. The configuration process of                  liquid B includes dissolving the ammonium                  chloride solid in the boiled deionized water to                  obtain saturated ammonium chloride solution,                  adding saturated ammonium chloride solution into                  25-28% concentrated ammonia water, adjusting the                  pH value to 11-13 to obtain ammonia-ammonium                  chloride buffer solution. The method includes                  adding liquid A and liquid C into the liquid B at                  the same time in the constant temperature, under                  the condition of stirring, the constant                  temperature is 25-80&#8451;, and the stirring                  speed is 500-850 r/minutes. The volume ratio of                  the A liquid, B liquid and C liquid is 1:                  (1-3):(1-2) and the reaction time is 0.5-2 hours.                  The aging temperature is 60-80&#8451; and the                  aging time is 20-30 hours. The product is                  centrifuged and washed for 3-4 times with                  absolute ethyl alcohol, dry temperature is                  80-100&#8451; for 8-12 hours. Preferred                  Components: The divalent M2 + is magnesium ion,                  cobalt ion, nickel ion, Mn2 + or copper ion,                  trivalent M3 + is aluminum ion or ferric ion. The                  anion of acid and salt is chloride ion or the                  cation of the salt is sodium ion, the LDH solid                  dispersed in the mixed solution of acid and salt                  after blowing for multiple times with nitrogen,                  and the oscillation time is 10-15 hours.

The weight ratio of the skimmed milk powder to the soluble soybean polysaccharide is (3.0-37.5): (2.0-4.0). The method further comprises mixing the mixed solution with an acid-adjusting aqueous solution containing an acidity regulator, and making the volume constant. After the carbon dioxide gas is filled, the aerated milk-containing beverage is filled without causing reverse overflow of carbon dioxide gas. The gum liquid also includes a sweetness modifier. The weight ratio of the soluble soybean polysaccharide to the acidity regulator is (2.0-4.0): (0.5-3.0). The weight ratio of the soluble soybean polysaccharide to the sweetness modifier is (2.0-4.0):(10-135).

AB    NOVELTY - The catalyst composition comprises a metal                complex and an organic compound. The metal complex                satisfies a predetermined chemical structure that                includes transition metal atom, independent group                selected from hydrogen atom, halogen atom, alkyl                group, alkenyl group, alkynyl group, alkoxy group,                amine group, phenyl group, benzyl group, cyclic                hydrocarbon group including hetero atom,                perfluoroalkyl group, or nitro group, and alkylene                group, cycloalkylene group, or phenylene group. PT P
PN CN112322366-A; CN112322366-B
TI Preparing natural gas by mixing and gasifying solar biomass, comprises sending prepared biomass particle raw material into the biomass gasification reaction furnace to gasify, generating carbon monoxide, hydrogen, carbon dioxide and methane.
AU WU H
   XU R
   WANG R
   LIU J
AE UNIV BEIJING CIVIL ENG & ARCHITECTURE (UBCE-C)
GA 202115120F
AB    NOVELTY - Preparing natural gas by mixing and gasifying solar biomass, comprises sending the prepared biomass particle raw material into the biomass gasification reaction furnace to gasify, generating carbon monoxide, hydrogen, carbon dioxide and methane, water and tar ash impurities, and then removing the tar ash impurities and carbon dioxide in the mixed gas and then sending into the methanation reaction unit to react to generate methane, where the biomass particles are heated by using solar energy and part of biomass particles from combustion as heat source together when gasification.
   USE - The method is useful for preparing natural gas by mixing and gasifying solar biomass.
   ADVANTAGE - The method realizes two renewable energy sources as raw material to prepare artificial natural gas, has high natural gas generation efficiency, good quality, small heat loss in the natural gas preparation process, and high energy utilization rate.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - INORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Method: The step of using solar energy and part of biomass particles to burn as heat source to supply heat together refers to setting a solar reflecting system on the direct sunlight area of the ground surface, reflecting and concentrating the sunlight to the biomass gasification reaction furnace to supply heat by the solar reflecting system, detecting the solar light reflection intensity, depending on the preset proportion, controlling and distributing part of the biomass particle raw material conveyed to the biomass gasification reaction furnace to directly burn. The biomass gasification reaction furnace is supplied with heat and the reaction temperature is stable by using the heat generated by the combustion and the reflection heat of the sunlight. The biomass particle is straw particle obtained by crushing straw. The gasification reaction temperature is 800-1000 degrees C. The method uses the following artificial natural gas production system. The artificial natural gas production system comprises a biomass gasification unit connected in turn by a gas path conveying pipeline and a tar ash removing device, a carbon dioxide removing device, a methanation reaction unit and a pressure swing adsorption separator. The biomass gasification unit comprises a heliostatarray mounted on the ground. The heliostat array is connected with the control center to form a solar reflecting system, further comprising a biomass gasification reaction furnace set on the ground. The biomass gasification reaction furnace comprises abase. The base is equipped with a reaction furnace body. The outer side wall of one side of the reaction furnace body is provided with a condensation solar energy cavity receiver at the position of solar light gathering point reflected by the heliostat array. The condensation solar cavity receiver is used for receiving the reflected solar light irradiation energy. The top part of the hearth of the reaction furnace body is provided with a reaction furnace gaseous raw material input port for external water vapor and carbon dioxide input pipeline and a reaction furnace solid raw material input port for externally connecting the biomass raw material input pipeline. The hearth bottom of the reaction furnace body is further provided with a hot chemical product outlet. The hot chemical product outlet is externally connected with a gas path conveying pipeline. The biomass gasification reaction furnace further comprises a biomass combustion furnace installed on the base; the biomass combustion furnace top part is provided with a combustion furnace solid raw material input port for inputting biomass raw material. The combustion furnace solid raw material inlet is connected with the biomass raw material input pipeline through a shunt pipeline installed with a shunt control valve. The shunt control valve is connected with the control center, the biomass combustion furnace is further connected with an air input pipeline for combustion. The bottom of the biomass particle combustion furnace is further connected with a flue gas pipeline. The flue gas pipeline and the flue gas heating interlayer hearth covered on the outer surface of the reaction furnace body are connected. The top part of the flue gas heating interlayer hearth is provided with a hearth flue gas discharging pipeline. The gas path conveying pipeline between the biomass gasification unit and the tar ash removing device is further connected in series with a volume type steam-water heat exchanger. Volume type steam-water heat exchanger is provided with a cooling water input end connected with the cooling water pipeline, further comprising a steam output end; the steam output end is divided into two steam conveying pipeline, where one steam conveying pipeline and one carbon dioxide conveying pipeline are connected to the water vapor and carbon dioxide input pipeline of the reaction furnace body, and the other one is connected to the shell of the water gas conversion reactor.
DC H09 (Fuel products not of petroleum origin - excluding coal handling, preparation or mining, but including coking, briquetting, peat processing synthesis, gas production, coal gasification. Combustion improvement additives for coal, peat and other nonhydrocarbon based fuels are included in this Section together with coal liquefaction and desulphurisation.); H06 (Gaseous and liquid fuels - including pollution control. Chemical aspects of catalytic exhaust systems for cars are included as well as liquid or gaseous fuels of non-petroleum origin e.g. methanol or ethanol-based fuels. Combustion improvement additives for liquid fuels are included (C10L).)
MC H06-A04; H06-P; H09-F03
IP C10J-003/72; C10L-003/08; C10L-003/10

PN CN111957711-A
TI Curing waste incineration coal ash involves mixing metal cation, waste incineration coal ash and blocking agent ethanol solution, crosslinking to form inorganic ion oligomer under condition of introducing carbon dioxide gas, and curing.
AU LIN X
   LI X
   YAN J
   HUANG Q
   WU A
   JIAO T
   CHEN Z
AE UNIV ZHEJIANG (UYZH-C)
GA 2020B81742
AB    NOVELTY - Efficiently curing waste incineration coal ash based on polymerization of inorganic oligomers involves mixing a metal cation, waste incineration coal ash and a blocking agent ethanol solution, crosslinking to form inorganic ion oligomer under the condition of introducing carbon dioxide gas or adding phosphoric acid, and curing heavy metals and organic pollution in coal ash. The metal cation is divalent calcium, divalent copper or divalent manganese. The blocking agent is triethylamine. The inorganic ion oligomer is calcium carbonate oligomer, calcium phosphate oligomer, copper phosphate oligomer or manganese phosphate oligomer.
   USE - The method is useful for efficiently curing waste incineration coal ash.
   ADVANTAGE - The method: is simple and cost-effective; does not emit pollution during the process; and consumes carbon dioxide to achieve carbon sequestration in waste incineration power plants and reduce carbon emissions.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - ORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Components: The purity of the triethylamine is 99%. The volume concentration of the ethanol solvent is 95%.

PT P
PN CN111924845-A
TI Preparing activated carbon material with zero carbon emission by rapid activation method comprises mixing slurry, atomizing with carbon dioxide and compressed gas and reacting to obtain activated carbon and flue gas.
AU JIN C
   WANG L
   SUN R
   CHENG X
   CHEN H
   GENG W
   JIANG J
   YUN D
   ZHAO G
AE ENERGY RES INST SHANDONG ACAD SCI (UYQQ-C)
GA 2020B5494L
AB    NOVELTY - Preparing activated carbon material with zero carbon emission by rapid activation method comprises mixing the slurry, atomizing with carbon dioxide and compressed gas and reacting to obtain activated carbon and flue gas, where the slurry is coal slurry or a mixed liquid of coal slurry and biomass suspension, the coal slurry is a mixed liquid of coal powder and water and the biomass suspension is a mixed liquid of biomass powder and water.
   USE - The method is useful for preparing activated carbon material with zero carbon emission by rapid activation method.
   ADVANTAGE - The method: guarantees the good surface structure and mechanical strength of activated carbon; promotes the growth and development of the surface pore structure through activation and realizes the recycling of carbon dioxide in flue gas.
   DETAILED DESCRIPTION - An INDEPENDENT CLAIM is also included for a system for preparing activated carbon material with zero carbon emission by fast activation method.
TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - ORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preferred Components: The mass fractions of coal and biomass in the slurry are 25-45%. The particle size of the coal powder in the coal slurry is 60-80 mesh. The compressed gas is nitrogen or argon, the volume fraction of carbon dioxide in the mixed gas is 10-40% and the mixed gas includes carbon dioxide and compressed gas. Preferred Method: The reaction temperature for preparing activated carbon is 700-1000 degrees C, the heating rate is 100-125K s-1 and the reaction time is 8-15 seconds. The reaction temperature for preparing activated carbon is 850-950 degrees C. The flue gas undergoes purification treatment, oxidation treatment, and purification treatment to obtain carbon dioxide and the obtained carbon dioxide participates in the reaction of activated carbon. The purification treatment is to sequentially perform particulate filtering and tar separation filtering on the flue gas. The oxidation treatment is to subject the flue gas to an oxidation reaction under the conditions of an oxidation catalyst. The purification treatment is the reaction of carbon dioxide in the flue gas with calcium oxide or calcium hydroxide, and the flue gas is heated before the reaction. The heating temperature is 300-400 degrees C, preferably 350 degrees C.

PN CN211753674-U
TI Carbon dioxide gas fast purifying device, has active alumina storage tank connected with active carbon desulfurization storage tank that is connected with active carbon deorganic storage tank, where storage tank is connected with molecular sieve tank.
AU ZHANG C
   CHEN Z
   YUAN Z
AE HUBEI HUATEL PURIFICATION TECHNOLOGY CO (HUBE-Non-standard)
GA 2020A84665
AB    NOVELTY - The utility model claims a carbon dioxide gas fast purifying device, comprising an active alumina storage tank, wherein the active alumina storage tank is connected with an active carbon desulfurization storage tank; the active carbon desulfurization storage tank is connected with an active carbon deorganic storage tank; the active carbon deorganic storage tank is connected with a 4 A molecular sieve tank. the 4 A molecular sieve tank is connected with a 3 A molecular sieve tank. The utility model can effectively remove the organic sulphur, inorganic sulphur, alcohol, hydrocarbon, water, solving the industrial carbon dioxide gas in welding, other use of protector, carrier gas and other specific environment, bad protection effect, difficult to satisfy the actual use requirement. The adsorbent of the device type can be directly changed, can be heated and regenerated, repeatedly used.
