TF TECHNOLOGY FOCUS - ORGANIC CHEMISTRY - Preparation (Claimed): The preparation of                  (I), comprises performing condensation reaction                  on benzotriazole and chloromethylnaphthalene                  compound of formula (A) under the action of                  catalyst to obtain final product, where the                  substitution positions of the R group and                  chloromethyl group on naphthalene ring are                  respectively the 1-position or the 2-position of                  the naphthalene ring.Preferred Components: The molar ratio of                  benzotriazole and chloromethylnaphthalene                  compound (A) is 1-1.2:1. The molar ratio of                  benzotriazole and catalyst is 1-1.2:1. The                  catalyst is sodium hydroxide and/or potassium                  hydroxide. The weight ratio of the corrosion                  inhibitor active component and the solvent is                  20-40:80-60 and the solvent includes diesel oil                  and ethanol with a weight ratio of 80-50:20-50.                  The mass concentration of chloride ions in the                  oil field production environment is 1-5%, the                  carbon dioxide pressure is 1-4 MPa, and the                  temperature is 80-130&#8451;. The metal                  device material is 20 steel or N80 steel.Preferred Method: The reaction temperature                  in the condensation reaction process is                  60-100&#8451;, and the reaction time is 18-30                  hours.                                                                                                                              
   Preferred Definitions: R = methyl or                ethyl.

PN CN114524450-A
TI Preparation of cerium oxide UV absorbent by using            cerium salt and urea as raw material and obtaining nano            cerium oxide UV absorbent by controlling system            pressure in micro-channel reactor specified range            during preparation process.
AU QIN Y
   DING S
   LIU S
   GAO Q
   ZHAO H
   WEI Z
AE NANJING POLYTECHNIC INST (NJPI-C)
GA 202274234L
AB    NOVELTY - Preparation of cerium oxide UV absorbent                comprises using cerium salt and urea as raw                material and obtaining nano cerium oxide UV                absorbent by controlling the system pressure in                micro-channel reactor to be 10-15 atm during the                process of preparation.
   USE - Preparation method of cerium oxide UV                absorbent.
   ADVANTAGE - The method uses urea as precipitator,                generating ammonia and carbon dioxide by hydrolysis                reaction of urea in water solution under heating,                generating hydroxide precipitate by action of                cerium salt and ammonia water. At the same time,                the gas generated by urea hydrolysis forms bubbles,                the hydroxide precipitate generated by the reaction                is formed with impact and disturbance, the liquid                flow of the reaction system keeps the continuous                pushing force of the insoluble substance, avoiding                the reactor pipeline blocking and deposition of                insoluble substance. On the other hand, by                controlling the reaction system pressure, the                generation of the air bubble is avoided so that the                reaction system volume is rapidly increased so as                to cause the liquid flow intermittent spraying,                ensuring stable continuous production.
   DESCRIPTION OF DRAWING(S) - The drawing shows a flow chart of the                preparation cerium oxide UV absorbent. (Drawing                includes non-English language text).

PN CN114481664-A
TI Recycling by-products of alkaline pulping, comprises using acid-leached lignin, and separating lignin and caustic soda in black liquor by acidification and concentration step by step.
AU WANG Y
AE WANG Y (WANG-Individual)
GA 202269671M
AB    NOVELTY - Recycling by-products of alkaline pulping, comprises using acid-leached lignin, and separating the lignin and caustic soda in the black liquor by acidification and concentration step by step. The black liquor is neutralized with flue gas, the concentrated lignin is deposited, and the lignin is deposited with sulfuric acid and/or flocculants.
   USE - The method is useful for recycling by-products of alkaline pulping.
   ADVANTAGE - The method avoids large amount of alkali recovery furnace investment and installation and debugging and high operation cost. The method enlarges the pulp making team, improves the yield of the pulp, avoids or reduces the import of pulp, increases the employment post, and improves the utilization rate and utilization value of the crop straw. The carbon dioxide generated by the combustion of the fuel is fully used, which can avoid or reduce the pollution to the air, this pair reduces the carbon displacement, and it is very beneficial to realize the carbon double-carbon target. Because the water is recycled in the factory in the form of sodium hydroxide solution, so the water consumption is greatly reduced, it has important significance, especially for the pulping enterprises in the northern water shortage area.
DC F09 (Paper-making production of cellulose, chemical treatment of wood - including chipboard and fibre-board (D21).)
MC F05-A02C

AB    NOVELTY - The utility model relates to bamboo wood block carbonization technology field, and claims a debris processing device for bamboo processing production, solving the problem that the bamboo wood crushing block in the current market is recycled, comprising a bottom plate, the upper surface of the bottom fixedly connected with the carbonization chamber, the inner wall of the carbonization chamber fixedly connected with the heating plate, the inner part of the heating plate is provided with a heating pipe, the upper surface of the bottom plate fixedly connected with supporting frame, the upper surface of the supporting frame fixedly connected with a rotating motor, the output end of the rotating motor fixedly connected with rotating shaft, one end of the rotating shaft far away from the rotating motor fixedly connected with the storage box, the fixedly connected with of the carbonization chamber is provided with a smoke exhaust pipe; The utility model is provided with the processing after generating a large amount of cutting block for recycling and carbonizing so that the discarded bamboo crushing block can exert the effect, reducing a lot of resource waste.
DC P63 (Working, preserving wood (B27).)
